name: grayling-sentiment-analyser
description: Grayling AI Sentiment Intelligence tool. API routes deployed as Vercel serverless functions under /api/.

notes.deployment: Deploy via Vercel. Set GROQ_API_KEY and RESEND_API_KEY as environment variables in the Vercel dashboard.
notes.structure: API handlers live in /api/analyse.js and /api/contact.js. index.html is served as the static frontend.
